scripts.dev: concurrently --names api,web --prefix-colors blue,green "npm run dev -w @h-members/api" "npm run dev -w @h-members/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @h-members/shared && npm run build -w @h-members/api && npm run build -w @h-members/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @h-members/shared && npm run lint -w @h-members/api && npm run lint -w @h-members/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @h-members/shared && npm run typecheck -w @h-members/api && npm run typecheck -w @h-members/web
scripts.clean: npm run clean -w @h-members/shared && npm run clean -w @h-members/api && npm run clean -w @h-members/web
